embedding_model.architecture: BertModel with CLS pooling and L2 normalization
embedding_model.query_prefix: Represent this sentence for searching relevant passages:

documents.granularity: one table document followed by one document per column
documents.ordering: case-insensitive SQLite catalog-name order, then SQLite pragma_table_info column order
documents.overlength_behavior: truncate at the model tokenizer's 512-token limit

embedding_audit.vector_storage: raw embedding vectors remain local and are represented in each trace by ordered float32 SHA-256 digests
embedding_audit.query_digest_input: the normalized 384-dimensional query vector after applying the locked prefix

schema_pack.table_hit: include every column in the selected table
schema_pack.column_hits_only: include selected columns, primary-key columns, and selected-table join endpoints
schema_pack.foreign_keys: include edges whose endpoint tables are selected, in lexicographic order
schema_pack.serialization: one complete table declaration per line followed by FK lines

reproducibility_limitations: CPU and math-library differences can produce small floating-point differences
stable document-ID tie-breaking resolves exact score ties but not near-ties that reverse across runtimes
hosted SQL generation remains nondeterministic and uses committed response recordings for replay
